title: Security Management Specialists
description: Conduct security assessments for organizations, and design security systems and processes. May specialize in areas such as physical security or the safety of employees and facilities.

tasks.text: Assess the nature and level of physical security threats so that the scope of the problem can be determined.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Respond to emergency situations on an on-call basis.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Recommend improvements in security systems or procedures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform risk analyses so that appropriate countermeasures can be developed.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inspect physical security design features, installations, or programs to ensure compliance with applicable standards or regulations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct security audits to identify potential vulnerabilities related to physical security or staff safety.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Design security policies, programs, or practices to ensure adequate security relating to alarm response, access card use, and other security needs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Test security measures for final acceptance and implement or provide procedures for ongoing monitoring and evaluation of the measures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Design, implement, or establish requirements for security systems, video surveillance, motion detection, or closed-circuit television systems to ensure proper installation and operation.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare, maintain, or update security procedures, security system drawings, or related documentation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare documentation for case reports or court proceedings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop conceptual designs of security systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Train personnel in security procedures or use of security equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Review design drawings or technical documents for completeness, correctness, or appropriateness.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide system design and integration recommendations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor the work of contractors in the design, construction, and startup phases of security systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Budget and schedule security design work.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inspect fire, intruder detection, or other security systems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Develop or review specifications for design or construction of security systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Interview witnesses or suspects to identify persons responsible for security breaches or to establish losses, pursue prosecutions, or obtain restitution.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Outline system security criteria for pre-bid meetings with clients and companies to ensure comprehensiveness and appropriateness for implementation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor tapes or digital recordings to identify the source of losses.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Engineer, install, maintain, or repair security systems, programmable logic controls, or other security-related electronic systems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
